data.text: 初めて発言するきっかけ：
choices: I just want to add that...

data.text: 提案を断りつつ関係維持：
choices: I appreciate the thought. My concern is specifically...
I notice we're all processing. Would it help to think from [angle]?

data.text: データと直感が矛盾する時：
choices: Data says one thing, experience another. What might explain the gap?

data.text: 長い議論を着地させる：
choices: We've explored this thoroughly. I propose [option] for [reasons], revisiting in [timeframe].
